title: jules: record librarian learning on schema test supersedence 📚
summary: This run intended to fix a missing schema drift test for `CONTEXT_BUNDLE_SCHEMA_VERSION` in `xtask/tests/docs_w43.rs`, but the patch was superseded by #1604 on main. Created a learning PR to document the redundant execution friction.
proof_summary: Intended fix was aborted due to supersedence (#1604).
